language.label: Language
home.title: Partner Dashboard
home.subtitle: Review partner registration data, analysis results, and carbon/finance summaries.
home.notice: This first screen is the operating status board. Use the top menu to inspect each detailed chain screen.
partner.title: Manage company and institution codes.
partner.subtitle: Partner Code identifies taxi fleets, bus fleets, insurers, charging operators, repair shops, and affiliates.
partner.rule: Partner Code is for company, institution, and tenant identity. Never use it as an individual referral code.
referral.title: Manage individual, referral, and event codes.
referral.subtitle: Referral Code tracks drivers, sales managers, partner managers, and personal invitation links.
referral.rule: Referral Code is for individuals, referral events, and rewards. A linked partner and reward policy are required for reward settlement.
report.pdfLanguage: PDF reports must be generated in the selected language.
notice.noCreditTerm: Before certification, use Carbon Asset Candidate or Verified Carbon Data instead of Carbon Credit.
blocker.realCsvMissing: Real Ansan Transport CSV not confirmed
customerZero.title: View only the 143-vehicle Ansan Transport import result.
customerZero.summaryPending: Import Job summary will appear here.
customerZero.jobSummary: CSV {rows} rows → Evidence {evidence} → MRV {mrv} → Verification {verification} → Asset {asset} → Report {report}
chain.title: This shows how one taxi row becomes a report.
chain.notice: This screen shows IDs and values actually generated from the latest Import Job.
trace.title: Query the full genealogy with one packet_id.
ops.title: Carbon Operations Center
ops.notice: The operations screen is for finding root causes within 30 seconds.
customer2.title: Replicate Customer Zero success to the second customer.
customer2.notice: The goal is to onboard Customer #2 within 7 days and create the first Asset within 30 days.
customer2.partnerIdentityDesc: Organization-level codes for taxi fleets, bus fleets, charging operators, insurers, and maintenance partners.
customer2.referralIdentityDesc: Codes for drivers, sales managers, partner managers, and personal invitation links.
text.crossAccess: Referral accounts cannot access Partner Admin APIs
text.passwordStorage: Store access_password_hash only; never store raw passwords
text.auditLogging: Record login success/failure, password changes, repeated failures, and inactive access attempts
text.partnerLoginRoles: partner_code + password / partner admin, operations manager, read-only, finance
text.referralLoginRoles: referral_code + password / referral owner, referral agent, read-only
text.productionExposure: Expose only APPROVED or PUBLISHED content in production screens
text.fallbackRule: Missing translations fall back to en-US
text.legalReview: Carbon Asset / Registry / certification / settlement text requires LEGAL_REVIEWER approval
text.sensitiveTerms: Before formal certification, use Carbon Asset Candidate or Verified Carbon Data
text.partnerCodeForbidden: Do not use partner_code as a personal referral code.
text.referralPerformanceRule: Aggregate individual referral performance by referral code.
text.settlementRewardRule: Trace settlement evidence from referral code to linked partner to reward policy.
text.referralForbidden: Do not issue rewards when a referral code has no linked partner.
intelligence.title: Intelligence / Economic Decision Center
intelligence.subtitle: Analyze forecast, opportunity, optimization, ROI, and strategy recommendations together.
module.trustDesc: Creates timestamp, hash, signature, reject log, and audit trail.
module.mrvDesc: Calculates CO2e from distance, energy, solar, and battery data.
module.valueDesc: Converts reduction into economic value by carbon price.
module.registryDesc: Manages projects and asset candidates by status.
module.optimizationDesc: Recommends charging, solar, and route strategies.
module.fleetDesc: Analyzes empty distance, passenger distance, charging cost, and reduction.
module.solarMatchingDesc: Matches solar peak time with EV charging time.
module.trustScoreDesc: Scores calibration, audit, GPS, and data quality.
module.dailyAuditDesc: Checks hash, signature, calibration, and broken chains daily.
module.portfolioDesc: Aggregates reduction, value, assets, and trust score.
finance.title: Carbon Asset Portfolio
finance.subtitle: Manage Asset, Rating, Risk, Value, and Deal Room readiness from a portfolio view.
economic.title: Economic Decision Center
economic.subtitle: Provides ROI, Yield, Capital Allocation, and Strategy Recommendation.
projectFactory.title: Project Factory
projectFactory.subtitle: Manage project design and simulation in one screen.
dataCollection.title: Data Collection Center
dataCollection.subtitle: Collect mobility, charging, solar, ESS, and factory data in the Zenov standard.
trustEvidence.title: Trust / Evidence / Compliance Center
trustEvidence.subtitle: Manage Trust Packet, Evidence ID, Audit, and Compliance in one screen.
mrv.title: MRV / Carbon Value Center
mrv.subtitle: Manage reduction calculation and economic value in one screen.
carbonValue.title: Carbon Value Center
carbonValue.subtitle: Converts CO2e into economic value and records price sources.
registry.title: Registry / Verification Center
registry.subtitle: Manage Carbon Registry and Verification Workflow in one screen.
verification.title: Verification Center
verification.subtitle: Manages verification requests, Evidence Packages, and approval history.
ops.subtitle: Manages Action Tracking, Fleet, Solar, and ESS optimization.
digitalTwin.title: Digital Twin Center
digitalTwin.subtitle: Simulates Taxi and Solar expansion scenarios.
dealRoom.title: Deal Room
dealRoom.subtitle: Packages only VERIFIED Assets for investment review.
marketplace.title: Capital Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Manages investment interest and matching readiness, not trading.
ecosystem.title: Operations / Ecosystem Network
ecosystem.subtitle: Manage operations, customers, partners, verifiers, and investors in one screen.
compliance.title: Audit & Compliance Center
compliance.subtitle: Manages Daily Audit, Integrity Report, and Compliance Report.
center.ruleNotice: This page shows implementation state and next gates. It does not pretend deferred modules are complete.
rule.noMarketplaceBeforeRegistry: No Marketplace Before Registry and Verification
feature.projectDesignDesc: Designs EV, Solar, ESS, and Factory project types.
feature.projectSimulationDesc: Simulates CO2e and ROI after real data accumulates.
feature.projectCreationDesc: Creates Carbon Projects only with verifiable inputs.
feature.gatewayDesc: Receives external data into the Zenov standard collection structure.
feature.storeForwardDesc: Queues locally and resends when network recovery occurs.
feature.calibrationDesc: Uses sensor calibration state as an MRV gate.
feature.mobilityMrvDesc: Calculates EV Taxi, Bus, and Motorcycle reductions.
feature.doubleCountingDesc: Prevents the same electricity or distance from being counted twice.
feature.valueCalculatorDesc: Converts CO2e into KRW estimated value.
feature.carbonAssetDesc: Turns verifiable MRV results into Asset Candidates.
feature.statusAuditDesc: Records lifecycle changes in Audit Trail.
feature.verificationRequestDesc: Creates internal or external verification requests.
feature.evidencePackageDesc: Bundles Packet, Evidence, MRV, and Audit grounds.
feature.scenarioBuilderDesc: Inputs Taxi and Solar expansion cases.
feature.projectAutoDesignDesc: Generates Carbon Project drafts from conditions.
feature.verifiedOnlyDesc: Exposes only VERIFIED Assets to the Deal Room.
feature.dataRoomDesc: Downloads Evidence, MRV, Value, and Audit documents.
feature.interestDesc: Allows interest registration only, not trading.
feature.integrityReportDesc: Checks Hash, Signature, and Broken Chain.
feature.complianceReportDesc: Expands into regulatory and verifier submission reports.
education.title: ESG Education Materials
education.subtitle: Browse ESG, carbon neutrality, carbon MRV, investor, and public-sector training materials.
education.citizenDesc: Explains why carbon neutrality is connected to daily life.
education.corporateDesc: Explains business competitiveness and carbon management practice.
education.enterpriseDesc: Explains global regulation and supply-chain response strategy.
education.ipoDesc: Explains how ESG data connects to company value.
education.investorDesc: Explains carbon data as a new asset market.
education.governmentDesc: Explains carbon neutrality as national industrial strategy.
partnerFolder.title: 01 Partner Folder
partnerFolder.subtitle: Manage partner codes, referral codes, and MRV calculation links in one place.
partnerFolder.runAllReady: This button tests Partner create/verify and Referral create/verify APIs at once.
mrv.pilotNotice: Connect Pilot Portal, Partner Login, and File Reader data into the Zenov MRV chain.
mrv.readyStandalone: Chrome standalone function is connected. Press the button to run a fresh calculation.
executive.partnerNextQuestionnaire: Save the questionnaire in the Partner Folder first.
executive.partnerNextPilot: Proceed with the real-data integration meeting.
executive.partnerNextSiteReview: Review charging and solar site conditions.
executive.partnerNextOnboarding: Proceed with Customer Zero review including driver signup and vehicle registration.
execBanner.description: Review partner questionnaire results and business opportunities.
execSection.salesQuestion: How many contracts can close this month?
execNotice.workFolders: The top menu keeps only three items, and detailed work folders are accessed inside the Partner Dashboard.
auth.executiveCopy: The partner dashboard is available only after partner code verification.
auth.defaultNotice: Enter a partner code to open the dashboard for that partner.
auth.missingFields: Please enter both partner code and password.
auth.invalid: Partner code or password is not correct.
projectFactory.solarChargingCalc: Ansan Transport Solar + EV Charging Project: 282t → KETS ₩4,230,000 / Premium GS Value $8,460.00
projectFactory.solar600Calc: Ansan Transport 600kW Solar Installation: 324t → KETS ₩4,860,000 / Premium GS Value $9,720.00
projectFactory.ansanSolarChargingProject: Ansan Transport Solar + EV Charging Project
projectFactory.creditNotice: Carbon reduction is not a Carbon Credit. Zenov evaluates Additionality, Baseline, Leakage, Permanence, and Trust to show registry readiness.
projectFactory.creditWaiting: Credit readiness is evaluated automatically after project creation.
financeSolar.paybackValue: Installation cost KRW 800,000,000 / electricity savings only about 7.1 years / AI-MRV + carbon assetization target 5 years
financeSolar.assetizationValue: Electricity savings + K-ETS + Gold Standard + VERRA + supply-chain ESG + RE100 evidence
